title: WDM Persistent-State Schema (wdm-persistent-state-v1.0)
description: Schema for the WDM (democratic-integrity) monitor's `persistent-state.json` — the canonical knowledge-base file the Applier writes to. Mirrors the AGM reference impl shape (Sprint-5 Phase 2, BRIEF cf14eabd). The `_meta` block is strict; all other top-level module keys are permissive (`additionalProperties: true`). Sprint-5 Phase 3 adds the top-level `arrays` block declaring, for every persistent-state array WDM cares about, the merge `key_field` and `key_constraint` (pattern or enum). The engine reads these declarations to enforce additive merge semantics and raise `DisjointKeySchemeError` on key-scheme rotation (E10 cure).

schema_version.description: Schema version of this file. Canonical value: `aim-persistent-state-v1.0`. Legacy bake value `2.0` (string or number) accepted during the AD-2026-04-26Y bake window.

last_updated.description: Most recent material state change. ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) or full ISO-8601 timestamp. Bumped by the Applier on cycles that land at least one patch; NOT bumped on null cycles.

last_issue.description: Issue counter. The Applier increments this by 1 on cycles that land at least one patch when the current value is an integer.

heatmap_countries.rapid_decay.describe: Heatmap countries in rapid democratic decay (WDM's Living Knowledge primary surface). `country` is the free-form country name (e.g. 'United States', 'Georgia'). ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 normalisation deferred — current persistent-state uses full country names.

heatmap_countries.recovery.describe: Heatmap countries showing democratic recovery trajectory. Same free-form `country` name key as rapid_decay.

heatmap_countries.watchlist.describe: Heatmap countries on the watchlist (pre-threshold monitoring). Same free-form `country` name key.

mimicry_chains.describe: Documented influence/narrative-mimicry chains. `chain_id` is a free-form slug (e.g. 'russian-foreign-agent-chain'). Not enum-locked — new chains are discovered as events unfold.

institutional_integrity_active_flags.describe: Active institutional-integrity signal flags (interpreter-schema declared array). `country` is the free-form country name. Multiple flags per country are possible; the engine merges by (country, indicator) in practice but `country` is the primary key discriminator declared here.

calibration_log.describe: Append-only calibration log (one entry per material methodology change). `date` is ISO date or full ISO-8601 timestamp. Engine treats this array as additive-only by construction. Matches AGM calibration_log convention.

gaps_register.describe: Open-findings register. Pattern lock matches the WDM-GAP-NNN scheme in live persistent-state (WDM-GAP-001 through WDM-GAP-007). Prevents Interpreter from rotating to free-form gap_ids. Archived-only per routing.md Sprint AV BRIEF #2.

module_2.election_cycle_events.describe: Election cycle events from the interpreter output (module_2). `country` is the free-form country name. Forward-declared here so the Phase 3 coverage gate exits clean for the interpreter-schema array.

module_4.electoral_contexts.describe: Per-country electoral context entries (module_4 interpreter output). `country` is the free-form country name. Forward-declared so the Phase 3 coverage gate is satisfied.

jurisdiction_risk_matrix.describe: Per-jurisdiction democratic risk matrix (top-level interpreter-output array). `jurisdiction` is currently free-form (country names and regional groupings). Forward-declared here so the Phase 3 coverage gate exits clean.

key_judgments.describe: WDM key-judgments array (top-level interpreter output). Pattern lock against the wdm-int-{ISO-date}-{4-digit-sequence} scheme declared in the interpreter-schema. Prevents Interpreter from rotating id format mid-cycle.
